mapper.insert: insert into PRODUCT ( product_id, is_active, product_name, product_type, min_period_month, max_period_month, min_amount, max_amount, target_customer, product_desc, interest_payment_type, applied_exchange_rate_type, created_at, updated_at, created_by, approver, approve_status, updated_by, app_start_date, app_end_date, mkt_msg_top, mkt_msg_bottom, join_method, auto_transfer_svc, revolving_info, saving_method, payment_restriction, precautions, fx_cash_fee, auto_reinvestment, tax_benefit, payment_limit_info, data_access_right, illegal_contract_cancel, depositor_protection, rate_category) values ( #{product_id}, #{product_name}, #{is_active}, #{product_type}, #{min_period_month}, #{max_period_month}, #{min_amount}, #{max_amount}, #{target_customer}, #{product_desc}, #{interest_payment_type}, #{applied_exchange_rate_type}, #{created_at}, #{updated_at}, #{created_by}, #{updated_by}, #{approver}, #{approve_status}, #{app_start_date}, #{app_end_date}, #{mkt_msg_top}, #{mkt_msg_bottom}, #{join_method}, #{auto_transfer_svc}, #{saving_method}, #{payment_restriction}, #{precautions}, #{fx_cash_fee}, #{auto_reinvestment}, #{tax_benefit}, #{payment_limit_info}, #{data_access_right}, #{illegal_contract_cancel}, #{depositor_protection}, #{rate_category})
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET product_name = #{productName}, min_amount = #{minAmount}, max_amount = #{maxAmount}, app_start_date = #{appStartDate}, app_end_date = #{appEndDate}, mkt_msg_top = #{mktMsgTop}, mkt_msg_bottom = #{mktMsgBottom}, precautions = #{precautions}, approve_status = #{approveStatus}, updated_at = SYSDATE, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
